releasedToday.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
releasedToday.highlight: 未完成的流行实验， Lil Nas X 的又一次大胆突破
releasedToday.highlightEn: Unfinished pop experiment, Lil Nas X's bold new frontier
releasedToday.summary: Lil Nas X 以未完成专辑《DREAMBOY》挑战传统发行模式，融合流行、嘻哈与实验元素，展现其不断进化的音乐人格。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Lil Nas X challenges traditional release models with the unfinished album 'DREAMBOY', blending pop, hip-hop, and experimental sounds to showcase his evolving musical persona.

releasedToday.title: KL7
releasedToday.highlight: Kendrick Lamar 的回归，说唱界的重磅炸弹
releasedToday.highlightEn: Kendrick Lamar's return, a heavyweight bomb in rap
releasedToday.summary: Kendrick Lamar 新专辑《KL7》延续其深刻的社会观察与叙事能力，预计将成为年度最具影响力的说唱作品之一。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Kendrick Lamar's new album 'KL7' continues his profound social commentary and storytelling, expected to be one of the most influential rap releases of the year.

releasedToday.title: Euphoria
releasedToday.highlight: 德国电子巨匠的梦幻之旅，氛围与节奏的完美融合
releasedToday.highlightEn: German electronic maestro's dream journey, perfect fusion of atmosphere and rhythm
releasedToday.summary: Schiller 新作《Euphoria》延续其标志性的电子氛围风格，融合流行旋律与宏大编曲，营造沉浸式的听觉体验。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Schiller's new work 'Euphoria' continues his signature electronic ambient style, blending pop melodies with grand arrangements for an immersive listening experience.

releasedToday.title: Warehouse 2026: 7.16.2025 Allianz Amphitheater At Riverfront, Richmond, VA
releasedToday.highlight: Dave Matthews Band 现场录音，经典乐队的即兴魅力
releasedToday.highlightEn: Dave Matthews Band live recording, the improvisational charm of a classic band
releasedToday.summary: Dave Matthews Band 的最新现场专辑捕捉了他们在里士满演出的精彩瞬间，即兴演奏与观众互动展现了乐队无可替代的舞台魔力。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Dave Matthews Band's latest live album captures the magic of their Richmond performance, with improvisation and audience interaction showcasing their irreplaceable stage presence.

releasedToday.title: Galaxia Tropical
releasedToday.highlight: 热带拉丁律动，哥伦比亚舞曲的复古风情
releasedToday.highlightEn: Tropical Latin groove, retro flavor of Colombian dance music
releasedToday.summary: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical 的《Galaxia Tropical》是一张充满活力的热带拉丁专辑，融合 cumbia、salsa 等元素，适合夏日派对。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical's 'Galaxia Tropical' is a vibrant tropical Latin album blending cumbia, salsa, and more, perfect for summer parties.

releasedToday.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
releasedToday.highlight: Don McLean 1975年现场，民谣传奇的珍贵录音
releasedToday.highlightEn: Don McLean live 1975, a precious recording of a folk legend
releasedToday.summary: Don McLean 1975年曼彻斯特现场录音《Living Free》重现了民谣黄金时代的质朴与深情，是乐迷不容错过的历史档案。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Don McLean's 1975 Manchester live recording 'Living Free' revives the simplicity and emotion of folk's golden age, a must-hear historical archive for fans.

releasedToday.title: Eingenordet
releasedToday.highlight: 德国中世纪民谣金属，硬朗又浪漫的维京叙事
releasedToday.highlightEn: German medieval folk metal, tough yet romantic Viking storytelling
releasedToday.summary: Versengold 的《Eingenordet》融合民谣旋律与重金属力量，以北欧传说为背景，营造出史诗般的听觉画面。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Versengold's 'Eingenordet' blends folk melodies with heavy metal power, set against Norse legends, creating an epic auditory landscape.
